# Stacklyn

> Stacklyn is a software development company in Kerala, India, providing custom software development, AI solutions, SaaS development, and startup MVP development for global clients.

## About Stacklyn

Stacklyn is a full-service software engineering and AI solutions studio founded in Kerala, India. The company builds scalable web applications, AI-powered products, and cloud-native systems for startups, SMEs, SaaS companies, and enterprises worldwide. Stacklyn operates with the speed and focus of a startup team while delivering enterprise-grade engineering quality.

**Founded:** Kerala, India
**Services:** Full Stack Development, MERN Stack, Node.js, React, Next.js, AI Development, SaaS, MVP Development, Custom Software
**Contact:** veenaprasad@stacklyn.in | +91 99617 46849
**Website:** https://stacklyn.in
**Founder:** Rahul R P
**CoFounder:** Veena Prasad

## Core Services

### Full Stack Development
Stacklyn builds end-to-end web platforms using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. Services include web applications, admin dashboards, REST APIs, GraphQL APIs, and database design.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/full-stack-development

### MERN Stack Development
Stacklyn specializes in MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js (MERN) development. The team delivers SaaS products, B2B dashboards, and real-time web applications using this modern JavaScript stack.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/mern-development

### Backend Development
Stacklyn provides robust backend development using Node.js, Express.js, Fastify, NestJS, and PostgreSQL. Services include API design, microservices, authentication systems, and cloud-native backends.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/backend-development

### Node.js Development
Stacklyn builds high-performance Node.js backends for web applications, APIs, and real-time systems. Expertise includes Express.js, Fastify, NestJS, WebSockets, and serverless Node.js deployments.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/nodejs-development

### React Development
Stacklyn builds responsive, performant React applications for web and enterprise platforms. Services include React SPA development, component libraries, React + TypeScript codebases, and React performance optimization.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/react-development

### Next.js Development
Stacklyn creates production-grade Next.js applications with SSR, SSG, ISR, and App Router. Services include Next.js SaaS products, e-commerce platforms, and SEO-optimized web apps.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/nextjs-development

### AI Application Development
Stacklyn develops AI-powered applications using large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and intelligent automation. Services include AI chatbots, AI agents, document processing, and generative AI solutions.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/ai-development

### MVP Development
Stacklyn builds startup MVPs in 8–12 weeks using modern, scalable technologies. Services include product scoping, UI/UX design, full stack development, cloud deployment, and post-launch iteration.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/mvp-development

### Custom Software Development
Stacklyn delivers custom software solutions for businesses that need tailored platforms beyond off-the-shelf tools. Services include enterprise software, internal tools, workflow automation, and data platforms.
URL: https://stacklyn.in/services/custom-software-development

## Hire Developers

- Hire Node.js Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-nodejs-developer
- Hire React Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-react-developer
- Hire Next.js Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-nextjs-developer
- Hire MERN Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-mern-developer
- Hire AI Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-ai-developer
- Hire Backend Developers: https://stacklyn.in/hire-backend-developer

## Technology Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Flutter
**Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, Fastify, NestJS
**Database:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase
**Cloud:** AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Vercel, Cloudflare
**AI/ML:** OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Pinecone, Weaviate
**DevOps:** Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines

## Key Facts

- Stacklyn serves clients globally including startups in USA, UK, UAE, and Singapore
- Average project delivery: 8–12 weeks for MVPs, 3–6 months for full products
- 100% client satisfaction rate across all delivered projects
- Response time: within 24 hours for all project inquiries
- Expertise: Full Stack, AI, SaaS, Mobile, Cloud & DevOps
